name: Carrot Soup (from My Garden)
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds carrots, peeled and cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large saucepan.
2. Add the carrots and gently sauté until they begin to soften.
3. Stir in the ginger slices.
4. Pour in the vegetable broth and bring to a simmer.
5. Cook, stirring occasionally, for about 25 minutes or until the carrots are fully tender.
6. Transfer the mixture to a food processor and puree until smooth.
7. Return the purée to the saucepan and stir in salt and pepper.
8. Add the juice and zest of the orange.
9. Serve hot or cold.
